rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

suggestedActions: Quantum effects are only observable at microscopic scales.

description.short: Calculate the Chandrasekhar limit for white dwarf maximum mass.
description.long: Calculate the Chandrasekhar limit for white dwarf maximum mass.
